name: Coriander Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the 1 tablespoon Channa dal with 1-4 red chilies over low flame until golden brown.
2. Allow to cool, then add coconut, cilantro, green chilies, and salt to a blender with water. Blend to desired consistency.
3. Place in bowl.
4. In a small pan, fry mustard seeds, Channa dal, and Urad dal in oil until the mustard seeds pop. Use as garnish on top of chutney.
